calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lynn Le, an individual.
Dept: 306. Judge: Dennis W Hayashi; Clerk: C. Balanga; Proceedings not recorded, commencing at 10:17 a.m.

Atty, Jason Burrows Esq., appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Lynn Le, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on November 01, 2024, with trial set for today, April 14, 2025.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank and against defendant Lynn Le an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $14,057.07.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived

Total - $14,057.07

An updated proposed Judgment will be submitted via e-mail to be signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:29 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Set For Trial On Apr-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
